---
title: "Commercial Health Check"
subtitle: "Score your Commercial Health — the leading indicator of whether you'll grow"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-context}
::: {.pc-crumb}
Commercial Health <span class="sep">›</span> The Check
:::
::: {.pc-supports}
**This is the reference implementation of the [Commercial Health Index Specification](../governance/index.qmd).**
Rate the statements; your score computes live in your browser.
:::
::: {.pc-row}
<span class="chip chip-grade-c no-dot">Self-assessment · confidence grade C</span>
<span class="chip chip-neutral no-dot">7 dimensions · 21 statements</span>
:::
:::

Financial statements measure your past. **Commercial Health measures your future** — your ability to
find, win, keep, and grow customers. Rate each statement from **1 (strongly disagree)** to **5
(strongly agree)**. Nothing is sent anywhere; the score is computed in your browser from the
[canonical framework](../frameworks/index.qmd).

```{python}
#| label: chi-data
#| echo: false
import sys, pathlib, json
_root = pathlib.Path.cwd()
while _root != _root.parent and not (_root / "src").is_dir():
    _root = _root.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_root))
from src.chi import load_chi
from IPython.display import HTML
HTML('<script id="chi-data" type="application/json">' + json.dumps(load_chi()) + '</script>')
```

```{=html}
<style>
.chi-app { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr; gap:2rem; align-items:start; margin:1rem 0 1.6rem; }
.chi-col-head { font-family:var(--sig-serif); font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--sig-ink-strong); margin:0 0 .6rem; }
.chi-dim-head { font-weight:700; color:var(--sig-ink-strong); margin:1.2rem 0 .4rem; font-size:1.02rem; border-bottom:1px solid var(--sig-border); padding-bottom:.3rem; }
.chi-q { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr auto; gap:.5rem 1rem; align-items:center; padding:.4rem 0; border-bottom:1px solid #eef2f7; }
.chi-q-text { font-size:.92rem; color:var(--sig-ink); }
.chi-scale { display:flex; gap:.1rem; }
.chi-scale label { display:inline-flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; cursor:pointer; font-size:.72rem; color:var(--sig-muted); width:30px; }
.chi-scale input { cursor:pointer; }
.chi-result { position:sticky; top:1rem; }
.chi-bars { display:grid; gap:.5rem; margin:1rem 0 1.2rem; }
.chi-bar-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:150px 1fr 40px; align-items:center; gap:.6rem; }
.chi-bar-name { font-size:.86rem; color:var(--sig-ink); }
.chi-bar-track { height:11px; background:#eef2f7; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; }
.chi-bar-fill { height:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8CC63F,#5E8E28); border-radius:999px; transition:width .25s ease; }
.chi-bar-score { font-weight:700; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; text-align:right; color:var(--sig-ink-strong); }
.chi-gaps { background:#f4f8fc; border:1px solid #cfe0f1; border-radius:.6rem; padding:1rem 1.2rem; }
@media (max-width:900px){ .chi-app{ grid-template-columns:1fr } .chi-result{ position:static } }
</style>

<div class="chi-app">
  <div>
    <div class="chi-col-head">Take the check</div>
    <div id="chi-form"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="chi-result">
    <div class="chi-col-head">Your result</div>
    <div class="metric-row">
      <div class="metric is-accent">
        <div class="metric-label">Commercial Health Index</div>
        <div class="metric-value" id="chi-score">&mdash;</div>
        <div class="metric-sub" id="chi-conf"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="metric">
        <div class="metric-label">Maturity band</div>
        <div class="metric-value" style="font-size:1.2rem" id="chi-band">&mdash;</div>
        <div class="metric-sub" id="chi-band-meaning"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="chi-bars" id="chi-bars"></div>
    <div class="chi-gaps" id="chi-gaps"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  function init() {
    var el = document.getElementById("chi-data");
    var form = document.getElementById("chi-form");
    if (!el || !form) return;
    var CHI = JSON.parse(el.textContent);
    var labels = (CHI.answer_scale && CHI.answer_scale.labels) || {};
    CHI.dimensions.forEach(function (d) {
      var h = document.createElement("div"); h.className = "chi-dim-head"; h.textContent = d.name;
      form.appendChild(h);
      d.statements.forEach(function (s, i) {
        var row = document.createElement("div"); row.className = "chi-q";
        var t = document.createElement("div"); t.className = "chi-q-text"; t.textContent = s;
        var scale = document.createElement("div"); scale.className = "chi-scale";
        for (var v = 1; v <= 5; v++) {
          var lab = document.createElement("label"); lab.title = labels[v] || v;
          var input = document.createElement("input");
          input.type = "radio"; input.name = d.id + "_" + i; input.value = v;
          if (v === 3) input.checked = true;
          var num = document.createElement("span"); num.textContent = v;
          lab.appendChild(input); lab.appendChild(num); scale.appendChild(lab);
        }
        row.appendChild(t); row.appendChild(scale); form.appendChild(row);
      });
    });
    function bandFor(score) {
      for (var i = 0; i < CHI.bands.length; i++) {
        var b = CHI.bands[i]; if (score >= b.min && score <= b.max) return b;
      }
      return CHI.bands[CHI.bands.length - 1];
    }
    function compute() {
      var wsum = 0, wtot = 0, dims = [];
      CHI.dimensions.forEach(function (d) {
        var vals = d.statements.map(function (s, i) {
          var sel = form.querySelector('input[name="' + d.id + "_" + i + '"]:checked');
          return ((sel ? +sel.value : 3) - 1) / 4 * 100;
        });
        var score = vals.reduce(function (a, b) { return a + b; }, 0) / vals.length;
        dims.push({ name: d.name, score: score, next_move: d.next_move });
        wsum += d.weight * score; wtot += d.weight;
      });
      var chi = Math.round((wsum / wtot) * 10) / 10, band = bandFor(chi);
      var gaps = dims.slice().sort(function (a, b) { return a.score - b.score; }).slice(0, 2);
      document.getElementById("chi-score").innerHTML = Math.round(chi) + '<span style="font-size:1rem;color:var(--sig-muted)"> / 100</span>';
      document.getElementById("chi-conf").textContent = "Confidence " + (CHI.confidence_self_report || "C") + " · self-reported";
      document.getElementById("chi-band").textContent = "Level " + band.level + " · " + band.name;
      document.getElementById("chi-band-meaning").textContent = band.meaning || "";
      document.getElementById("chi-bars").innerHTML = dims.map(function (d) {
        return '<div class="chi-bar-row"><div class="chi-bar-name">' + d.name + '</div><div class="chi-bar-track"><div class="chi-bar-fill" style="width:' + d.score + '%"></div></div><div class="chi-bar-score">' + Math.round(d.score) + '</div></div>';
      }).join("");
      document.getElementById("chi-gaps").innerHTML = '<strong>Start here — your two weakest dimensions:</strong><ul style="margin:.5rem 0 0">' + gaps.map(function (g) {
        return "<li><strong>" + g.name + "</strong> (" + Math.round(g.score) + " / 100) — " + g.next_move + "</li>";
      }).join("") + "</ul>";
    }
    form.addEventListener("change", compute);
    compute();
  }
  if (document.readyState === "loading") document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  else init();
})();
</script>
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**This score is grade C — indicative, self-reported.** It's an honest starting point, not a verdict.
To reach grade B or A, the same dimensions are *measured* from your CRM data over time (see the
[Commercial Health Index Specification](../governance/index.qmd)). Want the walkthrough that turns your
weakest dimensions into a plan?
[Book a Commercial Health walkthrough](mailto:info@sa-informatics.com?subject=Commercial%20Health%20walkthrough).
:::

## How the score works

Transparent by design — the engine below is the tested `src/chi.py` computing a worked example, so you
can see exactly how a business's answers become a score.

```{python}
#| label: worked-example
#| echo: false
from src.chi import commercial_health_index

sample = {  # an illustrative business (synthetic — for demonstration only)
    "D1": [4, 3, 2], "D2": [3, 2, 3], "D3": [2, 3, 2], "D4": [2, 2, 1],
    "D5": [3, 3, 2], "D6": [2, 2, 3], "D7": [3, 2, 3],
}
res = commercial_health_index(sample)
rows = "".join(
    f"<tr><td>{d['name']}</td><td style='text-align:right'>{d['score']:.0f}</td></tr>"
    for d in res["dimensions"]
)
HTML(
    f"<p><strong>Worked example (illustrative):</strong> a business answering as above scores "
    f"<strong>CHI {res['chi']:.0f} / 100</strong> — Level {res['band']['level']} · {res['band']['name']} "
    f"(confidence {res['confidence']}). Weakest: "
    + ", ".join(f"{g['name']} ({g['score']:.0f})" for g in res['gaps']) + "."
    + "<table class='table' style='margin-top:.6rem;max-width:420px'><thead><tr><th>Dimension</th>"
      "<th style='text-align:right'>Score</th></tr></thead><tbody>" + rows + "</tbody></table>"
)
```

- **Indicator:** each answer `1..5` → `(answer − 1) / 4 × 100`.
- **Dimension:** the mean of its three indicator scores.
- **Commercial Health Index:** the weighted mean of the seven dimensions (equal weight at v0.1).
- **Confidence:** self-assessment is capped at grade **C**; measured data raises it toward **B/A**.

## Related

- [Commercial Health Index Specification](../governance/index.qmd) — the canonical definition.
- [The frameworks](../frameworks/index.qmd) — where the CHI weights and statements live as data.
- [Decisions](../decisions/index.qmd) — the decisions a healthier commercial system supports.
